blocks.text: The claim adapter performs the following under the same file lock.

items: confirm the C5 selector selected the current runtime
leave the task Queued when an active foreign lease exists
write a new active lease with fencing_token = previous + 1 when no lease exists or the old lease is expired/released
refresh same runtime + same capability fingerprint active leases only when heartbeat running_task_ids contains the task id
save the lease sidecar, then save the guarded task transition into task DB

blocks.text: On provider progress or terminal report, the task DB reporter checks the active lease under the same file lock before saving the C1 transition.
Progress mutation is rejected when the lease is missing, expired, mismatched, or not active. Terminal report records released_at for the task lease.

Before claim, expired leases are reconciled under the same file lock. Preparing/Running leases are handed off through Blocked then Queued, Claimed leases fail, NeedsInput leases time out, and waiting/terminal/validation-review stale leases are released without state mutation.
